name: Savannah Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line 3 layer-cake pans with foil.
2. Spread each with one flavor of softened ice cream.
3. Cover with foil and freeze.
4. When frozen, remove ice cream from pans.
5. Put together in alternate layers with cake.
6. Whip heavy cream with confectioners' sugar added slowly until soft peaks form. Add vanilla.
7. Cover the assembled cake with the whipped cream mixture.
8. Drizzle Chocolate Glaze around the outside edge of cake so that a little of the glaze falls down the sides.
9. Serve at once or keep cake and ice cream frozen until just before serving and then cover with whipped cream icing and Chocolate Glaze.
